name: Korean-Style Grilled Beef Short Ribs and Scallions
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut through the meaty side of each short rib to the bone at 1/2-inch intervals, leaving the meat attached to the bone.
2. In a bowl, whisk together well the garlic, soy sauce, oil, ginger root, sugar, vinegar, sesame seeds, and pepper. Coat each short rib thoroughly with the marinade.
3. Transfer the ribs, along with the scallions and any remaining marinade, to a large resealable plastic bag. Seal the bag and let the mixture marinate in the refrigerator, turning occasionally, overnight.
4. Grill the ribs, meaty side down on an oiled rack set 4-5 inches over hot coals for 8 minutes. Turn them and grill for another 6 minutes for medium-rare.
5. Grill the scallions for 4 minutes or until they are just brown.
